title: iQOO starts teasing the Z11i, showcases it in all colors
summary: The iQOO Z11 family already has a lot of members, but one more is coming soon: the Z11i. The brand has just started teasing it in China, revealing its three colorways: Green Peak, Desert Gold, and Ink Shadow. You can see all three in the official images below. iQOO Z11i official images While iQOO i…
